The generational disputes, the land's hidden influence, the ancestor's journal... it all weaves together into such a rich tapestry. It's truly rewarding to have this kind of synergy, and her eagerness to delve deeper into the gameplay manifestation is exactly what I was hoping for just moments ago.

He's right, the idea of players contributing unique skills and seeing the direct impact of their combined actions on the world is a powerful selling point—that communal achievement aspect is exactly what I was aiming for. We've established a solid foundation. My next step is definitely to continue this focused brainstorming session with Yamamoto-san, Suzuki-san, and Ito-san.
